selection_methodology.selection: uniform random sample without replacement from GitHub star-sorted candidate pool
selection_methodology.commit_policy: HEAD resolved and pinned at selection time

evaluation_policy.scope_note: Uncovered categories require architecture, configuration, dependency/SCA, identity, integrity, or runtime logging evidence and are not inferred from this Semgrep-only run.
evaluation_policy.ground_truth: not available for ordinary high-star repositories
evaluation_policy.accuracy_statement: precision, false-positive rate, and false-negative rate are not computable from this corpus
